# Usa Site

**Summary**: Outcrop locations in the United States used for sample collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-elsayed|Elsayed, 2019]] collected rock samples from various outcrop sites in the USA.

## Key Findings From This Location

- Samples included three carbonate types (Indiana, Pink Desert) and three sandstone types (Kentucky, Bandera, Berea). ([[2019-elsayed|Elsayed, 2019, p. 77]])
